original_image_tags: Aged, slightly stained paper document with two punch holes at the top. Contains typed letter from J. Edgar Hoover, various handwritten annotations in blue, red, and black ink, and official stamps.

elements.description: Typed letter dated November 1, 1947, addressed to Mrs. A. McCaul from John Edgar Hoover, Director, expressing appreciation for a letter postmarked October 28, 1947. Includes a note stating 'This woman rambles on and furnishes no specific information about anything.' The page contains handwritten annotations, stamps, and typed distribution names, but no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.
